mnemonics.title: SPARK for Resource Types
mnemonics.content: Think SPARK for Module 5 resources: S for Surveys, P for Papers, A for Articles, R for Repositories, K for Knowledge bases. These are the five key categories of AI learning resources.

mnemonics.title: Resource Evaluation Criteria
mnemonics.content: CAR: Credibility (who wrote it?), Accuracy (is it current and correct?), Reproducibility (can you replicate it?). Always check CAR before trusting a resource.
